title: Dinner Favors, To S.
content:
I fill my goblet to the brim
     And clink the glasses rim to rim.
     Across the board I waft a kiss
     With thanks for such an hour as this,
     And clasping joy, bid sorrow flee,
     And welcome you my vis-�-vis.
meaning:
"Dinner Favors, To S." is a quintessential example of Arthur Macy's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
